---
title: if-return
description: "Simplify redundant error checks before returning."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Simplify redundant error checks before returning. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
if err := save(); err != nil { return err }
return nil
```

## Good

```go
err := save()
return err
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only if-return`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`. The default severity is `note`.
